text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm Matikanetannhauser. Nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I want to try and pull off some awesome
races that'll make people happy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm gonna train hard! Ei, ei, mun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
